allow: Bash(python3 -c "from lark_oapi.api.docx.v1 import Block; import inspect; members = [m for m in dir\(Block\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(members\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "diagram\\|flow")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from feishu_docx.core.sdk import FeishuSDK
from feishu_docx.utils.config import AppConfig
from feishu_docx.schema.models import BlockType

config = AppConfig.load\(\)
sdk = FeishuSDK\(\)
token = sdk.auth.get_access_token\(config.app_id, config.app_secret, auth_mode=config.auth_mode\)

doc_id = 'DNlqdE87EooAYVxs983cTlC1n2Q'
blocks = sdk.docx.get_block_list\(document_id=doc_id, access_token=token\)

# 找到 diagram block
for b in blocks:
    if b.block_type == BlockType.DIAGRAM:
        print\(f'=== DIAGRAM block ==='\)
        print\(f'block_id: {b.block_id}'\)
        print\(f'diagram_type: {b.diagram.diagram_type if b.diagram else None}'\)
        print\(f'children: {b.children}'\)
        print\(\)
        
        # 查看子 block
        if b.children:
            for child_id in b.children:
                child = next\(\(x for x in blocks if x.block_id == child_id\), None\)
                if child:
                    print\(f'  --- Child block ---'\)
                    print\(f'  block_id: {child.block_id}'\)
                    print\(f'  block_type: {child.block_type} \({BlockType\(child.block_type\).name}\)'\)
                    print\(f'  children: {child.children}'\)
                    for attr in ['text', 'code', 'page', 'heading1', 'heading2', 'heading3']:
                        val = getattr\(child, attr, None\)
                        if val and hasattr\(val, 'elements'\) and val.elements:
                            texts = [e.text_run.content if e.text_run else '' for e in val.elements]
                            combined = ''.join\(texts\)
                            print\(f'  {attr} content: {combined[:200]}'\)
                    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
